# [Organization Statements](#organization-statements)

Statements for organizing project structure: creating modules and folders, and moving documents between them.

| Statement | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [CREATE MODULE](#create-module) | Create a new module in the project |
| [CREATE FOLDER](#create-folder) | Create a folder within a module for organizing documents |
| [DROP FOLDER](#drop-folder) | Drop an empty folder from a module |
| [MOVE](#move) | Move a document to a different module or folder |
| [MOVE FOLDER](#move-folder) | Move a folder to another location or module |
